subject: Chemistry
topics: Solid State: types of solids, unit cell dimensions, packing efficiency and voids
Solutions: Raoult's law, colligative properties and van't Hoff factor
Electrochemistry: Nernst equation, conductance and Kohlrausch's law
Chemical Kinetics: order of reaction, integrated rate law, Arrhenius equation
Surface Chemistry: adsorption, colloids, Tyndall effect and coagulation
p-Block Elements: Group 15, 16, 17 properties and oxoacids
d and f Block: properties of transition metals, coordination compounds
Coordination Chemistry: Werner's theory, IUPAC nomenclature, isomerism
Haloalkanes: SN1 and SN2 mechanisms, stereochemistry
Alcohols and Phenols: acidic nature, reactions with Na, Lucas test
Aldehydes and Ketones: nucleophilic addition, Aldol condensation
Carboxylic Acids and Derivatives: acidity, esterification, amide formation
Amines: basicity, Hoffmann degradation, diazonium salts
Biomolecules: carbohydrates, proteins, nucleic acids classification
Polymers: types, addition and condensation polymers with examples
Chemistry in Everyday Life: drugs, food additives, cleansing agents
